commands.review_summary:
The PR adds DSML capture/parsing to DeepSeek text filtering, injects recovered synthetic toolCall blocks in the OpenAI completions stream, and adds parser/filter tests.

PR surface: Source +105, Tests +85. Total +190 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible: the linked issue provides live CLI evidence, and current main shows DSML text is filtered while only native choiceDelta.tool_calls become executable. I did not rerun the credentialed provider path in this read-only review.
